tools.name: list_coverage
tools.description: List tickers and periods available in this mock.

tools.name: get_fundamentals
tools.description: Return reported fundamentals (long format: metric/value/unit) for a ticker.

tools.name: get_consensus_estimates
tools.description: Return consensus vs actual vs prior guidance per metric (for beat/miss analysis).

tools.name: get_prices
tools.description: Return recent closing prices for a ticker (with context notes).
